Off Calendar Feb-11-2019 Continued To Mar-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-17-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Continued To Oct-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mario Paolini, Jr. for George Allen.

Mr. Paolini requested a continuance stating that the estate is ready to be closed, that the accounting is ready and that he did not have notice of this hearing. Status on close of estate is continued to October 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-05-2018 Continued To Sep-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on September 19, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear, and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Wu. Not reported.

Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order
